items.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
items.summary: Built on top of the open-source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
items.summary: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

items.title: Nvidia bets $150B on Taiwan as Trump's plan to make US an AI hub backfires
items.summary: Nvidia will invest $150 billion a year to make Taiwan an AI “epicenter.”

items.title: YouTube to begin automatically labeling AI videos
items.summary: AI videos that are animated, unrealistic, or only have a little AI may still hide their origins, though.
